purpose: Intricate nail art design showcased on modest, well-groomed hands. Saudi nail art is culturally popular — showcases salon artistry and product.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Macro nail art photography showcasing {nail_design_descriptor} design on elegant {skin_tone} female hands, intricate detailed nail art with {color_palette} color story, hyper-realistic nail surface texture and shine, natural nail length (not extreme), nails resting on {surface_descriptor} — marble, velvet, dried flowers, or fabric, soft directional natural light from above, hands in elegant relaxed pose, modest styling (no visible arm above wrist if possible), no rings that could distract from nails unless gold-appropriate, shot on 100mm macro at f/4, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: exposed arm above wrist
Avoid in output: extreme nail length
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Saudi adaptation guidance: Nail art is extremely popular in Saudi women's beauty culture. Hands-only framing is inherently modest. Avoid gestures that could be read as rude. Eid and occasion-themed nail art (crescent, arabesque, green-gold) performs extremely well. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 2-4 per week for nail salons. Compliance level: standard.
